name: Ixia
description: Ixia was a prominent computer networking company headquartered in Calabasas, California, that specialized in providing application performance and security resilience solutions. The company offered advanced testing, visibility, and security products designed to validate the performance, stability, and security of applications, devices, networks, and data centers under high-stress conditions. Serving a global client base across approximately 30 countries, Ixia played a critical role in ensuring network reliability for enterprises and service providers. In 2017, Ixia was acquired by Keysight Technologies, integrating its testing and visibility expertise into Keysight's broader portfolio of electronic design and test solutions.
